case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,A MUNICIPAL CORPO VS. THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR VALIDATION ACTION. HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,A MUNICIPAL CORPO RATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABL E RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE OR ANY CLOUD UPON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE THERETO SEE SCANNED DOC-STATEMENT OF DECISION AND JUDGMENT CONFIRMING VALIDITY OF EXCHANGE AGREEMENT AND QUIETING TITLE.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Off Calendar

Validation Action.
Off Calendar Mar-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Uncontested/Validation hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Martin L. Greenman, Esq./Deputy City Attorney for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco.
This matter was fully argued and considered and proof was made to the satistaction of the Court. The Court, having considered the evidence and heard the arguments and stipulation of the parties, and being bully advised, issues the Statement of Decision, and grants Judgment Confirming Validity of Exchange Agreement and Quieting Title (see scanned doc. for detais.), signed in Open Court.
